name: nimi-mods
description: First-party runtime mods for Nimi desktop runtime.

scripts.generate:spec: pnpm run generate:spec:narrative-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:textplay-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:videoplay-kernel-docs
scripts.check:spec: pnpm run check:spec:narrative && pnpm run check:spec:textplay && pnpm run check:spec:videoplay
scripts.check:spec:narrative: pnpm run check:spec:narrative-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:narrative-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:textplay: pnpm run check:spec:textplay-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:textplay-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:videoplay: pnpm run check:spec:videoplay-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:videoplay-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-kismet run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-local-chat run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-re-life run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-world-studio run typecheck
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-kismet run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-local-chat run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-re-life run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-world-studio run clean
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm run check:spec && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build -- --all && pnpm run check:dist
